evidence.title: NPE infringement notice
evidence.snippet: A US NPE sent claim charts alleging e-commerce recommendation patent infringement.

evidence.title: Former distributor misuse
evidence.snippet: Former US distributor retained confidential pricing playbooks and undercut channels.

evidence.title: German bifurcation risk
evidence.snippet: Automotive supplier sued in Munich for sensor patent; invalidity action filed separately.

evidence.title: Passing off and confusion
evidence.snippet: SaaS entrant faces UK complaint for similar brand color and slogan.
